i need to rebuild the pipeline for my ai agent swarm solidity contract auditor. I need to modify the run_slither tool in main.py to execute slither with the --json flag slither will output a machine readable JSON file containing the exact vulnerabilitu names, severity levels, and precise line numbers, then write a function in main.py that opens the .sol file goes to extract the line numbers provided  by slithers JSON and copies the string, and then pass only the extracted vulnerability name and the exact code snippet to the LLM instructing it to only write the description and remediation sections, this is because of code bleed and hallucinations by the LLM when they were tasked with the same. This hybrid approach is to restrict the LLMs to synthesizing text only
this is initiated by the flake.nix which creates the env then main.py links the vulnerable .sol file to slither and the LLMs
